meaning: n.马达加斯加人,马尔加什人[语]adj.马尔加什人[语]的
examples: Zimmerman studied Malagasy populations on Madagascar.
loosely means 'please' in Malagasy, or more specifically 'excuse me'
Some randomly picked an animal, others a group of people (the Malagasy).
The new Ariary will buy five Malagasy francs, and will be made up of five subdivisions called Iraimbilanja.
Its Malagasy name refers to its carnivorous diet and isolation on a landmass in the middle of the ocean.
